name: deephome-claude
description: Deephome intent search prototype — recover the user's true intent from surface search words, then map it to queryable listing attributes.

scripts.build: tsc demo.ts demo-enrich.ts src/globals.d.ts --outDir dist --module commonjs --target es2020 --moduleResolution node --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop
scripts.build:run: npm run build && node dist/demo.js && node dist/demo-enrich.js
